feat.name: And Will Do So Once More
feat.text: You’ve learned how to let go of most worries and move past them. The trigger for All This Will Happen Again instead becomes, “You fail or critically fail a Fortitude, Reflex, or Will saving throw.” You still can use All This Will Happen Again only once per day.

traits.name: Samsaran
traits.text: Blue-skinned people native to Zi Ha, who reincarnate upon death and recall pieces of their past lives.
